overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing a character walking through the Hollis neighborhood in Liberty City. The character navigates urban residential streets with brick apartment buildings, crosses intersections, and passes pedestrians and vehicles on a sunny day.

mature deciduous tree with green canopy casting shadows

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with trees and brick apartment buildings. Approaching an intersection, the character crosses the street at a crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in a yellow shirt walking in the opposite direction.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing benches and trash cans

metal mesh trash receptacle on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the residential sidewalk, passing street furniture including benches and trash cans. The camera moves past parked cars while brick apartment buildings remain visible across the street, approaching the next intersection.

character crosses the intersection as traffic light changes

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an intersection and waits at the corner for the traffic light to change. After the light turns green, the character crosses the street while a yellow taxi passes through the intersection. The scene opens up to show the wide crosswalk and surrounding brick buildings.

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the sidewalk, passing a small black dog walking ahead. The environment includes a green dumpster and parked vehicles. A police car becomes visible at the approaching intersection, along with a distinctive gray brick municipal building in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at the intersection, passing a woman with shopping bags. After reaching the corner, the character stops near a decorative street sign and looks around at the surrounding traffic and buildings, concluding the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny residential neighborhood of brick apartment buildings that gradually leads toward a municipal center. It begins with the character walking along a tree-lined concrete sidewalk and crossing an initial intersection past a pedestrian in a yellow shirt. As the journey continues, the camera glides past street benches, trash cans, and parked cars before pausing at a traffic light to let a yellow taxi pass through a wide crosswalk. The scene then shifts toward a more urbanized stretch, passing a small black dog and a green dumpster as a police car and a gray brick municipal building emerge in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character across one last intersection past a woman with shopping bags, coming to a halt near a decorative street sign to survey the surrounding traffic and architecture.
